title: elaphoglossum calanasanicum
intro: Elaphoglossum calanasanicum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which is known to thrive on other plants and surfaces, and is native to the tropical regions of the world. The medicinal properties of Elaphoglossum calanasanicum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
